reason: An alcoholic writer abandons everything and moves to Vegas, facing harsh new realities while starting completely over.
After losing her husband and daughter, a woman rebuilds her life from scratch in an emotionally raw journey to rediscovery.
A man finds himself penniless and alone in Paris, starting from zero in a darkly comic struggle to reclaim his life.
Unemployed steelworkers walk away from their old jobs and forge a messy, uncertain new path as amateur performers.
A young woman quits city life after her parents die, tackling rural chaos and carving out her own unpredictable future.
A dissatisfied fisherman leaves his old life behind to become a postman on a remote island, discovering new beginnings amid simplicity.
A star sports agent walks away from his firm, launching a small agency and navigating the messy reality of starting fresh.
A schoolteacher with a quiet life loses her memory, then walks away from the ordinary to uncover her dangerous past and start anew.
A widow quits her life of privilege to join the army, facing the disorienting start of a brand-new identity.
A teenager walks away from her old life to raise orphaned geese in a new land, confronting the uncertainty of starting from zero.
